$comment: ADR-P013 Batch 1 — USDA FoodData Central foodPortion gram-weight provenance for slice foods. Human-reviewed manifest; the fdc-portion-manifest.spec.ts gate enforces schema, provenance, unit compatibility, gramWeight bounds, macro reconciliation against fdcPer100g, and authored-grams === derivedGramsPerServing. Never edit gram values without re-deriving them from the pinned archive.

tolerances.$comment: Macro-reconciliation gate (ADR-P013 acceptance criterion c). FDC per-100g macros scaled to derivedGramsPerServing must agree with the catalog's authored per-serving macros within these bounds.

entries.reviewNote: Catalog serving is 1 slice; SR portion 'slice' = 32 g. Non-toasted commercial record chosen over toasted/recipe variants. Reconciliation: 80.6 kcal vs 73 authored (delta 7.6 <= 25).
Catalog serving is 1 slice; SR offers regular (32 g), thin (25 g), snack (7 g) — 'slice, regular' matches the authored 81 kcal (reconciles to 82.9 kcal, delta 1.9).
Catalog food is generic 'Sprouted grain bread' (not brand-specific); SR 'Bread, wheat, sprouted' is the closest analytical record. Reconciliation: 71.4 kcal vs 85 authored (delta 13.6 <= 25).

Catalog serving is 2 slices; SR portion is exactly 2 slices = 57 g. 'Unprepared' reconciles (62.7 kcal vs 75, P 11.58 vs 11); the alternate 168383 'cooked, pan-fried' (slice = 13.8 g) FAILS the gate (40.3 kcal vs 75) and was rejected.

unmatched.reason: SR Legacy has no standalone sourdough record. The only sourdough-inclusive candidate 172675 'Bread, french or vienna (includes sourdough)' carries a 139 g 'slice' portion, which fails macro reconciliation against the authored 97 kcal slice (scaled estimate 378.1 kcal, delta 281 >> 25). Left null and gated per ADR-P013 (never force-fit); revisit in a later batch with a different pinned dataset (e.g. FNDDS) if desired.
